databaseContract.acceptedTarget: A pending premium quarantine created by a manual, failed, incremental controlled-failure run with matching run and batch lineage.
databaseContract.rejectedTargets: Unknown UUIDs, scheduled/manual non-demo quarantines, non-failed runs, resolved rows, and rows outside the predefined missing-policy scenario.
databaseContract.browserEvidence: The sanitized public view exposes a recoverable boolean; it does not expose payloads, source transaction identifiers, SQL errors, or stack traces.
databaseContract.authoritativeBoundary: public.run_demo_pipeline_action(text, uuid) validates the target under the pipeline advisory lock before invoking the private runner.

automatedVerification.checksumShapeContract: All recorded fact checksums are 32-character lowercase hexadecimal values and the pre-recovery snapshot agrees across hosted evidence artifacts.

boundaries: Verification after the additive migration was read-only; no additional normal, failure, or recovery run was invoked.
All data and recovery scenarios are synthetic portfolio evidence.
This is not a NICO system, production workload, stakeholder approval, UAT result, or production-readiness claim.
